issues.title: tabChanged event is never dispatched
issues.attack: Plan creates listener but no code dispatches the event. Core goal of tab active state update fails for normal tab clicks.
issues.response: Design spec line 37 explicitly scopes t19 as infrastructure only. Event dispatching is assigned to t20, t21, t23.

issues.title: DOMContentLoaded fails on HTMX navigation
issues.attack: Badge init uses DOMContentLoaded which won't fire on HTMX-navigated page entries, the primary nav path.
issues.response: Valid. Must adopt htmx:afterSettle + readyState pattern like existing context-autosave.js.

issues.title: Duplicate event listener registration on HTMX re-swap
issues.attack: Script in swapped content re-adds listeners on each HTMX navigation, causing memory leaks and multiple handler executions.
issues.response: Valid. Must wrap in IIFE with cleanup logic following context-autosave.js pattern.

issues.title: project_delete() error path missing tab_latest
issues.attack: project_delete() renders project_detail.html without tab_latest in context.
issues.response: Valid. Will add tab_latest via shared helper to both views.

issues.title: Manual verification too weak
issues.attack: Step 5 only checks DOM attributes and script loading, not actual behavior.
issues.response: Valid. Will expand verification to test console dispatch, sessionStorage, badge rings.

issues.title: Import style — local import inside function
issues.attack: from django.db.models import Max as local import inconsistent with existing top-level pattern.
issues.response: Valid. Will move Max to top-level import.

issues.title: offers missing from tab_latest
issues.attack: tab_latest has 3 keys vs tab_counts 4 keys, inconsistent.
issues.response: Valid. Will add offers for forward compatibility.

issues.title: depends_on mismatch
issues.attack: Plan says depends_on none, forge-progress.json says t18.

issues.title: tabChanged event is never dispatched (follow-up)
issues.attack: Downstream tasks only dispatch for workflow flows, not regular tab bar clicks. Gap persists across all tasks.
issues.response: Gap valid at project level, documented as upstream note. Out of t19 scope per design spec. Severity: MINOR for t19.
